name: RMA Process
description: Guides the customer through the Return Merchandise Authorization process, including evidence collection, resolution preference, and ticket creation.

nodes.content: Let's begin the RMA process. Please confirm the product name and briefly describe the issue you're experiencing.
Please provide photos or other evidence of the defect. You can upload images or describe the visible damage in detail.
Checking product value against policy thresholds for automatic approval...
This RMA requires manager approval due to the product value. Your request has been submitted for review.
Creating your RMA ticket with all collected information. A unique RMA number will be assigned.
Your RMA ticket has been created. Preparing shipping label and return instructions for your package.
Your RMA has been successfully created. You will receive an email with your RMA number, prepaid shipping label, and return instructions. Please ship the product within 14 days.
Unfortunately, the RMA request was not approved based on our current policies. You may contact customer support for further options or file an appeal.
